nasb.text: With them by their generations according to their fathers’ households were 36,000 troops of the army for war, for they had many wives and sons.

esv.text: And along with them, by their generations, according to their fathers’ houses, were units of the army for war, 36,000, for they had many wives and sons.

cnv.text: 此外，與他們在一起的，按著譜系和家族，還有能作戰的軍隊三萬六千人，因為他們的妻子和兒子很多。

ccb.text: 他们妻儿众多，因此各宗族中可以出征作战的共有三万六千人。
